'''dathudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ufocal|ufocal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ufocal|ufocal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dathudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæthidith|dæthidith]] || [[word:dæthidij|dæthidij]] || [[word:dæthidish|dæthidish]] || [[word:dæthidi|dæthidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathuthuduth|dathuthuduth]] || [[word:dathuthuduj|dathuthuduj]] || [[word:dathuthudush|dathuthudush]] || [[word:dathuthudu|dathuthudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathuduth|dathuduth]] || [[word:dathuduj|dathuduj]] || [[word:dathudush|dathudush]] || [[word:dathudu|dathudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathufduth|dathufduth]] || [[word:dathufduj|dathufduj]] || [[word:dathufdush|dathufdush]] || [[word:dathufduf|dathufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dathuduthu|dathuduthu]] || [[word:dathuduju|dathuduju]] || [[word:dathudushu|dathudushu]] || [[word:dathuduku|dathuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dathuduth|dathuduth]] || [[word:dathuduj|dathuduj]] || [[word:dathudush|dathudush]] || [[word:dathudu|dathudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dathuduthul|dathuduthul]] || [[word:dathudujul|dathudujul]] || [[word:dathudushul|dathudushul]] || [[word:dathudukul|dathudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dathuduthuthu|dathuduthuthu]] || [[word:dathudujuju|dathudujuju]] || [[word:dathudushushu|dathudushushu]] || [[word:dathuduku|dathuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dathuduthun|dathuduthun]] || [[word:dathudujun|dathudujun]] || [[word:dathudushun|dathudushun]] || [[word:dathudukun|dathudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dathuduthuoro|dathuduthuoro]] || [[word:dathudujuoro|dathudujuoro]] || [[word:dathudushuoro|dathudushuoro]] || [[word:dathudukuoro|dathudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
